author: acmelabs
text:
Acme Engine v2.3 shipped today.
It cuts cold-start latency from 1200ms to 390ms.
The /data layer now uses reflink copies.
context_text: Benchmarks were run on an M2 with 16GB RAM.

author: queryio
text:
QueryIO added AUTOCOMMIT plus a read cache.
Read latency dropped from 2s to 390ms.
No schema migration was required.

author: runwild
text:
RunWild does NOT support Windows yet.
The CLI is a single 8MB Go binary.
It freezes the prefix for prompt caching.
context_text: Maintainer says Windows is not on the roadmap.
